text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Meow. Meooow. ...Woof. Woof, woof. Woof,
meow... woof.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Ya tryin' to be a cat or a dog? More
importantly... the hell are ya doin'?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm a pet. Some time ago, you mentioned wanting to get yourself a pet. So I thought for your birthday present, I could be your pet...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...If you're not pullin' my chain, then I'mma start
gettin' real worried, real fast.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I-I get it! I'm not actually a pet! But, isn't a
birthday a really important day? So I wanted to
celebrate yours, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But then you said you would rather save the
money instead of celebrating. That's why I did a
lot of thinking and decided on this.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...That's why you're pullin' this circus show? Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whether you're a cat or dog, ya still gotta eat,
don'tcha? Look, food's on you today—but I'll let
ya pick.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...!
Yeah, I'll treat you, let's go! Oops, I
mean—mewoof!
